step.name: check_storage_before
step.description: Check current storage usage before cleanup
step.script:
echo "=== Checking Storage Status ==="
curl -s http://backend:8000/api/storage/status | jq -r '
  "Total Storage: \(.total_size_mb) MB",
  "Total Files: \(.total_files)",
  "Status: \(.status)",
  "",
  "Breakdown:",
  (.directories | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.size_mb) MB (\(.value.file_count) files)")
' || echo "Could not fetch storage status"

step.name: execute_cleanup
step.description: Execute cleanup operations via backend API
step.script:
echo "=== Executing Cleanup ==="
echo "Retention period: ${RETENTION_DAYS} days"
echo ""

# Call backend cleanup endpoint
RESPONSE=$(curl -s -X POST http://backend:8000/api/storage/execute-cleanup \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"retention_days\": ${RETENTION_DAYS}}")

# Check if successful
if echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -e '.success' > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "✅ Cleanup completed successfully!"
  echo ""
  echo "=== Results ==="
  echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '
    "Storage Before: \(.results.summary.storage_before_mb) MB",
    "Storage After: \(.results.summary.storage_after_mb) MB",
    "Space Recovered: \(.results.summary.space_recovered_mb) MB",
    "",
    "Actions:",
    (.results.actions[] | "  • \(.)")
  '
else
  echo "❌ Cleanup failed:"
  echo "$RESPONSE" | jq -r '.error // .message'
  exit 1
fi

step.name: verify_cleanup
step.script:
echo ""
echo "=== Storage After Cleanup ==="
curl -s http://backend:8000/api/storage/status | jq -r '
  "Total Storage: \(.total_size_mb) MB",
  "Total Files: \(.total_files)",
  "Status: \(.status)",
  "",
  "Breakdown:",
  (.directories | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.size_mb) MB (\(.value.file_count) files)")
' || echo "Could not fetch storage status"
echo ""
echo "✅ Cleanup workflow completed successfully"
